prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: E-303 Terminations & splices is observed during operation after the reported concern was checked. Readings are steady, no abnormal sound or heat is noted, and the maintenance log shows the standard functional check was completed with no open punch note. Source anchors for review: NEC 110.14.
title: T1 E-303 Compliant Fault diagnosis
